

# **Aleph Creative Audio**

## Tech stack and architecture

* Around 50k lines of React Typescript code running inside NextJS 16+  
* Service is integrating 16 external providers, flows running through 67 internal API endpoints. [List of providers](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Gsh4T3yS-hrA4Lfx224knsA5TZT5mZ8DG_ohDJT2cVk/edit?gid=0#gid=0), their pricing, contracting status, account ownership and legal terms  
* Hosted on Vercel, using PostgresSQL (via [neon.com](http://neon.com)), Redis (via upstash.com) and Vercel Blob storage  
* Exposed via alephcreative.cloud domain (owned by MP)  
* Code repository hosted on Aleph’s Atlassian BitBucket, configured for continuous deployment on Vercel 

*High level architecture diagram*

*![][image1]*

*Flow orchestration diagram* 

*![][image2]*

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

*API Key management overhaul (switch to corporate accounts instead of personal subscriptions)*

*Infrastructure migration to Aleph’s accounts (or Selva), align branding (production domain)*

*Automatic vulnerability scan (Snyk maybe?)*

*CI/CD implementation*

*Branding alignment with Aleph (not as important at this point)*

## Current set of features and short-term roadmap(3-4 months)

### Login

**General features**

General basic login (single user and password for the entire platform)

**Current satisfaction level**

Needs work to be production ready.

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

Replace with Google Single Sign On for the Aleph account, and desirably only to a certain set of users (not company wide)

### Workspaces

**General features**

Shared workspace. Everyone has access to everything. General list of “projects”, each with its own context.

**Current satisfaction level**

Needs work to be production ready.

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

Workspaces isolated to each account.

### Project organization

**General features**

General list of “projects”, each with its own context.

**Current satisfaction level**

Needs work to be production ready.

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

Project title should be editable for easier identification.

Projects should have “versions” (in order to revert to a previously saved “checkpoint” in case its needed)

Projects should be duplicable.

Projects should be sharable to another account to enable collaboration.

Projects should have the option to input metadata to later use for reports and metrics, such as:

* Media campaign opportunity Salesforce URL (not needed to integrate with Salesforce, just a simple URL field is enough)  
* Opportunity amount.  
* “In production”, “Won”, “Lost” tags.  
* Market tag.  
* Client tag.   
* All fields should be optional to also allow for an “Exploration mode” where the project is not linked to a media opportunity.

### Audio production

#### Brief

**General features**

* Input fields for brand brief and creative brief  
* Ability to choose language, dialect and accent  
* Integrated with 6 voice providers (ElevenLabs, Lovo, OpenAI, Qwen, Bytedance, Lahajati)  
* Configuration for single-voice or dialogue, ad duration and pacing  
* Ability to ask the tool to weave in Spotify the same CTA in the creative script that will be presented with the ad

*Describe here how this interacts with additional backend instructions. Also elaborate on which providers process different field inputs, how dropdowns are populated, and how every component interacts with each other in order to generate the script and audio output*

**Current satisfaction level**

Functional but could improve. 

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

* Add the option to either “create a new script” (as it works now) or “add my own script” (skip the briefing step and jump directly to enter a pre-generated external script).   
* Include “Info” with tooltips to guide the user about what each field means. This should have a CRUD on the backend for easier management and update.  
* Include a field to add “tone of voice”, with already suggested options.  
  *Describe how this is populated*  
* Remove “Region” dropdown.

**Other quality of life improvements or features that we’d like to implement?**

* Importing brand tone through socials or URL  
* Integrating more creative templates to cover various Spotify best practices.  
  *Describe how.*

#### Script

**General features**

* Script is auto-generated by the AI based on Brief, voices chosen and directions given. A manual approach is also possible.  
  *Describe how this is generated (which “component” process which information and how it interacts with other components)*   
* Picking voices for the chosen language  
  *Describe providers and other backend configurations*   
* Editing the script, asking AI to recreate it (different tone, voices, language)  
* Editing acting directions supporting provider method (emotional tags, personalities, creative instructions)  
* Voice controls (speed and pitch control)

**Current satisfaction level**

Functional but could improve. 

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

* Have the script \+ music \+ fx \+ mixer all together in one single “Editor” screen, to be able to make changes without going back and forth between tabs.   
* Have the “Request a change” field as a chat window on the left that you can always ask the AI to make changes. 

#### Music

**General features**

* Ability to choose between 3 providers (Loudly, Mubert, Elevenlabs)  
* Music prompts are  auto-generated by AI based on Brief, tailor made for each provider  
* Can change the prompt or ask AI to deliver a new version with new direction  
* Ability to upload own music track  
* A library of already generated tracks

**Current satisfaction level**

Functional but could improve. 

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

* The duration settings currently assume full-length tracks, could allow to make them shorter  
* All provider integrations could be optimized to produce even better results based on Brief  
  *Describe how*  
* Official catalogs of Mubert and Loudly could be offered directly in the tool as a more reliable genre-specific alternative to hit-and-miss generation

#### FX

**General features**

* Music prompts are  auto-generated by AI based on Brief, tailor made for each provider  
* Ability to change the prompt, duration and sfx position (start, end, after voice x)

**Current satisfaction level**

Needs work.

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

* Each sound effect should have its own generation button, like the script dialogs have.   
* Be able to select exactly the amount of seconds you need the fx to be.  
* Have a library of existing effects.  
* Ability to upload own sound effects.

#### Mixer

**General features**

* Visualisation of the tracks and their timings  
* Previewing the mix  
* Ability to tweak tracks without affecting the timeline  
* Per-track level control  
* Downloading or deleting tracks   
* Exporting the mix according to Spotify’s technical specifications 

**Current satisfaction level**

Functional but could improve.

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

* Timeline should be editable by dragging and dropping elements.  
* Individual basic control per track (mute, drag & drop, general track volume control, volume curves to allow fade-ins and fade-outs)  
* Splitting and duplicating tracks  
* The tracks should have straight edges, to know exactly where each track ends and where exactly they overlap.  
* The tracks should start exactly where 00:00 is.  
* Have a playhead.

#### Preview

**Current satisfaction level**

Functional but could improve.

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

* Have the option to export the audio in this tab.  
* Be able to adjust the audio format settings.  
* Desktop preview (mobile only for now)

### Admin panel

**General features**

*Describe a bit more*

* Voice blacklisting per language / accent (most voices are multilingual but underperform in certain languages)  
* Voice/languages accounting, refreshing the voice cache with updated configurations on the provider side  
* Pronunciation management  
* Crude unit economics tracker  
  *Describe more*

**Current satisfaction level**

Needs work.

**If applicable, what has to be done to get to “production ready” levels?**

**Metrics and dashboarding**

Filters:

* General  
* Date  
* User (owner vs collaborator)  
* Mode (Exploration vs Opportinity)  
* Market  
* Language  
* Client  
* Status (In production, Won, Lost)

Metrics

* Total amount of projects  
* General ROI (cost of the entire platform vs opportunity)  
* Per project ROI (token usage cost vs opportunity amount)  
* Usage per provider (subscription \+ on demand where applicable)

## Mid-term roadmap (6 to 12 months)

* Brief generation from image  
* AI generated Image from script for ad cover  
* Teams and user hierarchy/types  
* Native speaker human check (when required by user)  
* Feedback gathering from previews  
* FAQs and knowledge base (for users and admins)	  
* Integrating pre-generated catalog for music beside AI-generation from different providers  
* Have the “Request a change” field as a chat window on the left that you can always ask the AI to make changes.   
* Be able to adjust the audio format settings.

## Long-term vision (indefinite timeline)

* Full Spotify format coverage (banners, videos)  
* Importing brand/campaign tone through socials, URL, images or videos  
* Learning based on ads performance (would need API access from Spotify)  
* Integration with Spotify Ad Manager  
* Brief gathering inside the platform
